title: astragalus onobrychis subsp. dacicus
intro: Astragalus onobrychis subsp. dacicus, also known as Dacic milk-vetch, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dacic milk-vetch include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and protect against oxidative stress. This plant can be prepared as herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of chronic diseases.
